deals.title: Borregas - Elmendorf Land
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters wanted to end listing after March. Isaac Linares interest in mobile home development stalled. No path forward. Signs picked up.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved. Deal terminated.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Devine Listing
deals.notes: Residential listing. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Mutual termination agreed. Property was underwater by 93k-143k. Listing agreement expired July 31 2026.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462 - Moore TX Listing Prep
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Prior VA loan purchase. Divorce situation - need to sell. Payoff 257k. Recommend list price 295k. CMA shows thin market.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Schedule photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Payoff confirmed 255k as of Feb 2026.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path - San Antonio Listing
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. MLS live May 14. Sellers relocating to North Carolina - high urgency. June deadline. Potential hairline foundation crack. Insurance claim moving forward for roof.
deals.next: Monitor showings. Follow up with interested buyers. Get updated payoff confirmation.

logs.m: MLS launched. First showing feedback received. Investor cash offer 176.3k discussed.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 - Devine REO Prep
deals.notes: Bank-owned property. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring starting this week. Water meter pending. Drywall and paint finishing.
deals.next: Call utilities to confirm new meter status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Priority Bank.

logs.m: Visited property. Cameras installed. Electric reconnected. Flooring starts this week. Water meter 1-2 days out.

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres - Land Sale
deals.notes: 20 acre hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza family at 113k. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier. EMD not yet received.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: New qualified buyers - Espinoza family. Amendment sent to Javier for signature.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd - Estate Sale
deals.notes: Estate sale. Cash transaction 152k. Closed and funded April 27 2026. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Thank you to Chelsey Bongiovi and vendors.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Cleared Apr 26.

leads.title: Mike and Alice Howell
leads.detail: LRH pop-up connection. Rental duplex being sold. Out of Corpus deal. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale property with Isaac Linares at 85k. FHA 203k rehab strategy. Decision expected soon.
leads.next: Follow up after Isaac phone call with Mike. Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Evaluate 203k feasibility.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Still actively searching for new construction.

leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Renting in San Antonio area. Looking to purchase home.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info from property site. Confirm wifes VA eligibility. Send VA buyers guide.

logs.m: Met on-site during Priority Bank property work. Wife is active military.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon get into real estate. Green Bliss rental setup with uncle James Jimbo Stringer. Mom Milagros Stringer is new construction buyer - 50k down, 1000/mo target payment.
leads.next: Confirm builder visit with Brandon and mom. Register as buyer agent before visit. Pull multiple builder options.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Relationship with Brandon intact. Focus on mom Milagros buyer opportunity.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Morns mother. New construction buyer. Budget 50k down, target 1000/mo payment. Looking at multiple builders - Lennar, DR Horton, MI Homes. Rate buydowns and builder incentives key strategy.
leads.next: Confirm builder visit with Brandon and Milagros. Pull new construction options. Register as buyer agent before visits.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent. Need to coordinate builder visits with multiple options.

leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation with specific needs. Details pending.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending on fixer opportunity.

leads.detail: David Roth referral - employee buyer program. Budget 50k down, 1000/mo target payment. Open to multiple builders and neighborhoods.
leads.next: Get contact info from David Roth. Pull new construction options. No aging commissions on employee purchase route.

logs.m: Employee purchase route confirmed - no aging commissions. Different incentive structure.

logs.m: Identified through Miss Pat. Sensitive situation - recent loss.
